title: fragaria magna var. moschata
intro: Fragaria magna var. moschata, also known as the musky strawberry, is a type of strawberry plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Asia. The leaves and roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Fragaria magna var. moschata include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to support digestive health and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
